chat.primarySubtitle: The primary thread stays linear; integrated branch knowledge is reused as hidden memory.
chat.memoryTooltip: Hidden memories are included in the next primary model call
chat.emptyMainBody: Configure an engine, send the first message, then branch from the Primary Flow whenever a side probe is useful.
chat.emptyBranchBody: The branch inherits the left snapshot. On close, choose Knowledge Integration or keep it as a clean snapshot.
chat.composerEnter: Message Tangent... (Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline)

parallel.memoryOnHint: Close with a distilled hidden memory written back to Primary Flow.
parallel.memoryOffHint: Keep this as a snapshot without changing Primary Flow.
parallel.readOnlyHint: Historical branch snapshot, read-only for review.
parallel.chatSubtitleOpen: Branch content stays on the right until Knowledge Integration is enabled.
parallel.chatSubtitleClosed: This historical branch is closed and available for review.

preferences.title: Interface Preferences
preferences.description: Adjust language, pane colors, and chat font size. Preferences are saved in this browser.

settings.descCreate: API keys are stored only in the local backend database; the frontend only shows whether one exists.
settings.descEdit: You are editing an existing provider. Leave API Key blank to keep the current key.
settings.enterNewlineHint: Enter inserts a newline; Ctrl/⌘ + Enter sends.
settings.branchMarkerCompactHint: Merge probes from the same primary position into one line.
settings.name: Name
settings.noticeUpdated: Provider updated. New requests will use the latest config.
settings.noticeCreated: Provider saved. Real model requests are ready.
settings.emptyBody: Add a real API key to power both Primary Flow and branches.
